raw_consumer_statement: I purchased products from XXXX XXXX in XX/XX/year> with my CITI Mastercard. The company went out of business and did not deliver all of the product. I filed a complaint on the chard with CITI. Apparently there were XXXX XXXX in disputed charges from other XXXX customers. I initially got the credit for my {$830.00} in product on the initial purchase {$1300.00}, and then in XXXX it was reversed. I called to try to find out why and they said that they never got information from XXXX.
